title: Publication of 2025 Ethics and Compliance Report
gist: Thin corporate press release announcing Glencore's 2025 Ethics and Compliance Report on 7 May 2026; carries no financial data, only governance statements about its compliance programme and boilerplate company description.

insights.claim: Glencore's Head of Compliance Nicola Leigh says the company now has a mature compliance programme but warns it will not remain effective if static, given the dynamic compliance landscape in the current complex geopolitical environment.
insights.speaker: Glencore investor reports
insights.so_what: Signals management views regulatory/geopolitical compliance risk as ongoing rather than resolved; relevant to monitoring legal-overhang risk on the stock.
insights.quote: While we believe we now have a mature programme, we recognise it will not remain effective if it is static.
insights.locator: Nicola Leigh, Head of Compliance, adds

insights.claim: Glencore published its 2025 Ethics and Compliance Report on 7 May 2026, with Chairman Kalidas Madhavpeddi stating the Board and senior management are focused on upholding responsible business practices.
insights.speaker: Glencore investor reports
insights.so_what: Marks the disclosure date for governance documents investors use to assess Glencore's post-settlement compliance posture.
insights.quote: The Board and senior management are focused on ensuring we uphold responsible business practices and maintaining an effective compliance programme is an important element to support this.
